# Sprout

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Sprout icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sprout;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sprout { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
